Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel further responses to supplemental request for production of documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $450 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
